source.notes: Compact focused fixture representing an ordinary selected sg replay seed from Phase 1 without committing corpus payloads.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Proves normal local parser artifacts remain deterministic and populated from observed OCAP top-level fields.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Provides a compact success artifact shape server-2 can later persist or compare through its own tables.
cross_app_impact.web: No direct UI behavior; downstream public stats still flow through server-2 APIs.

source.notes: Phase 1 malformed corpus evidence represented by a tiny invalid JSON fixture.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Malformed bytes produce a structured failed ParseArtifact instead of ordinary stats.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Supports parse.failed handling without implying replay discovery or persistence ownership here.
cross_app_impact.web: No public stats should be rendered from malformed input.

source.notes: Compact fixture for known OCAP top-level field drift summarized by Phase 1 shape profiling.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Recoverable schema drift stays visible through diagnostics and explicit unknowns.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Lets downstream persistence distinguish partial artifacts from hard parser failures.
cross_app_impact.web: No direct UI behavior; public display can later hide or label incomplete fields through server-2.

source.notes: Phase 4 raw killed-event tuple fixture preserves legacy array event shapes without copying real replay files.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Keeps old OCAP tuple compatibility evidence auditable through source refs.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Comparison harness can classify old-shape tuple behavior without changing server data ownership.

source.notes: Focused Phase 4 fixture with explicit winner and commander candidate evidence.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Proves known winner and commander candidate facts are source-backed parser evidence.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Supports later server-owned commander and outcome persistence decisions.
cross_app_impact.web: UI-visible commander/outcome display remains downstream of server-2 APIs.

source.notes: Normal compact fixture intentionally omits winner data to prove missing outcome remains explicit unknown.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Missing winner is represented as explicit unknown, not false negative evidence.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Downstream correction or inference remains server-owned.

source.notes: Focused Phase 4 vehicle score fixture covering issue #13 award and penalty inputs.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Provides auditable issue #13 vehicle score input rows and source refs.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Final cross-replay vehicle score remains server or harness responsibility.

source.notes: Focused aggregate fixture where same-side combat stays auditable but excluded from bounty inputs.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Teamkills remain source-backed combat events and aggregate evidence.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Bounty award calculation can consume only eligible parser inputs.
cross_app_impact.web: Public bounty display remains downstream of server-2.

source.notes: Focused Phase 4 commander-side candidate fixture with source refs and confidence.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Commander-side evidence is candidate-level observed identity only.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Canonical commander truth and moderation remain server-owned.

source.notes: Focused Phase 4 combat fixture covering explicit null-killer deaths.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Null-killer deaths stay explicit and auditable instead of becoming enemy kills.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Bounty and relationship calculation can exclude null-killer evidence.

source.notes: Focused Phase 3 compatibility fixture preserving duplicate same-name slot hints without entity merging.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Observed entities remain separate while legacy compatibility hints are explicit.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Canonical identity and merge decisions remain server-owned.

source.notes: Focused Phase 3 compatibility fixture for legacy connected-player name backfill.

cross_app_impact.parser_artifact: Backfilled observed names are marked inferred with compatibility provenance.
cross_app_impact.server_2: Canonical matching remains server-owned despite compatibility hints.
